etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "self" + "loath" + "-ing" from Old English "self" + "lath" + "-ing" (to hate oneself)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Hate oneself; experiencing self hatred and self-loathing self supported by healing awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Hate oneself → self hatred → contemporary self-loathing self and self-loathing contempt that benefits from compassion growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Hate oneself → self hatred → self-loathing self → compassion understanding
